---
title: "Launching Knowledge Discovery From Unity Client"
---

You can access Knowledge Discovery directly from the Unity Client.

To launch Knowledge Discovery from the Unity Client:

1.  Login to the Unity Client.
2.  On the upper right corner, click the Ask Discovery icon.   ![Ask Discovery icon in the Unity Client](data:image/png;base64,)   You are directed to the Knowledge Discovery page.Note: The Ask Discovery button should redirect you to the Knowledge Discovery page. If your version of OnBase of OnBase is set up for initial patches of version 25.1 this button will not work.
